first_attempt.execution_working_tree: the control checkout at launch time (pre-separation)
first_attempt.provenance_note: the launch record proves a527652 (not 4469b10): the supervisor script was committed after the driver started; provenance-pinned files are byte-identical between the two commits

control_plane_actions.supervisor_shell_terminated: PID 621497 (waiting retry controller only); the setsid driver group was verified alive and untouched
control_plane_actions.false_retry_prevented: the old supervisor's attempt-2 would have derived a fresh identity from moving master and rejected all rows
control_plane_actions.stall_detection_interim: supervisor watchdog is gone until attempt 1 ends; Monitors and 30-min pushed heartbeats carry stall detection
control_plane_actions.immutable_retry_architecture: execution worktree pinned detached at the row-bound commit; control supervisor now requires explicit M38E_EXEC_DIR + full 40-hex M38E_EXPECTED_SHA, refuses symbolic refs and abbreviations, and runs a deterministic preflight (detached-HEAD equality, clean tree, byte-identical provenance files, ledger presence, exact row validation via the driver's own validator) immediately before every launch; no fallback to cwd/branch/latest

tests: tests/test_m38e_control_plane.py — 8 synthetic-git tests (status commits cannot move the execution SHA, newer control master cannot satisfy the expectation, mismatch/symbolic/abbreviated/branch/dirty refusals, supervisor env refusal)
privacy_check_status: aggregate operational record only; no row content, prompts, task ids, or paths
